name: Smaran Harihar
tagline: Senior Software Engineer  ·  Frontend & Full-Stack  ·  Agentic AI · Harness Engineering · Geospatial · Computer Vision

runs.t: For 13+ years I've built scalable, high-performance web applications that turn complex data — and increasingly, AI itself — into fast, usable products.

runs.ph: [1–2 sentences tailored to [Company]: what specifically draws you to this team/product, and the problem you want to help solve.]

runs.t: At ThreeV Technologies I built the company's

runs.b: first AI development harness from scratch

runs.t: across a frontend and a full-stack codebase — automated guardrails (linting, formatting, unit and end-to-end tests), large-scale refactoring, and a domain knowledge graph that grounds LLMs in product context. The impact was concrete:

runs.b: test coverage rose from ~5% to ~85%, CI/build times dropped ~40%, and feature delivery sped up 20%+

runs.t: , with the team's first onboarding documentation created along the way. In the same role I build the computer-vision and geospatial interfaces — bounding-box and segmentation overlays, layered map views — that turn ML model outputs into clear inspection workflows for operators of critical infrastructure.
This builds on a decade of bridging complex data with the modern web. At
I architected a React/Node.js CMS serving millions of users across web and mobile, synchronized over Go/gRPC microservices, and was an early adopter of prompt and context engineering in the SDLC. At

, the global GIS leader, I architected framework-agnostic TypeScript libraries spanning Microsoft 365, Power BI, and SAP — repeatedly turning complex, cross-platform data into seamless product experiences.

My foundation — an M.S. in GIS & Technology (4.0 GPA, Computer Science minor, University of Arizona), a B.E. in Electronics & Telecommunication, and recognition as a Toastmasters Competent Leader — equips me to

runs.ph: [tie your strengths to what this role needs]

runs.t: . I'd welcome the chance to discuss how I can help
. Thank you for your time and consideration.
